description:
Offered: Spring
This course introduces discrete mathematics as applied to computer science. Topics covered include Boolean logic, elementary set theory, functions, relations, enumeration, proof techniques number systems and trees. Cross-listed with MATH 1900
Prerequisite(s): MATH 1250 or MATH 1300 or equivalent knowledge.
Note: Credit is not awarded for both CSC 1900 and MATH 1900 .
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL
prerequisites: MATH 1250 or MATH 1300 or equivalent knowledge.
